page_content:
Formerly: EDHI788K.

EDHI681 Education for Global Peace (3 Credits)

This course will examine how education can address the threats

of violence and wars. It prepares students to teach about peace, nonviolence, and conflict resolution, and also to analyze and implement changes in school and society to contribute to peace and non-violence. Credit Only Granted for. EDHI681, EDPL681, or EDPS681.
